Pieter Aertsen

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
The Egg Dance
by Pieter Aertsen
Northern Renaissance · 1552
In a crowded tavern, a young man dances around an egg without breaking it — a Flemish game with obvious symbolism. Pieter Aertsen paints peasant life as crowded, alive, and morally ambiguous.
←Cuyp, Aelbert Eastern Iran or Afghanistan→
